name: Bible Trivia
short_description: Chat with Moses and answer 1,500+ questions! Discover Bible stories, unlock chapters, collect cards, and enjoy new music, enhanced visuals, and full language support.
detailed_description:
Uncover the mysteries of the Bible with **Bible Trivia**!


Embark on an immersive journey through Scripture. With over 1,500 handcrafted questions, stunning visuals, and original music, Bible Trivia lets you explore biblical stories, parables, and teachings in a completely new way.


You can now **chat with Moses** — and soon, with other historical figures like David, Paul, and even Jesus! Dive into a unique spiritual adventure unlike anything you've played before.




Game Highlights:


🗣 Chat with Biblical Figures: Interact with Moses and uncover deeper insights into his journey. More characters like Abraham, Joseph, Noah, Paul, and Jesus are coming soon.



⭐ Star-Based Progression: Earn stars by answering questions and unlock new Bible chapters. Master each book and grow in your knowledge of Scripture.


🌍 Now in More Languages: Play in English, Spanish, Russian — and more to come! Join our growing global community.


🎭 Custom Avatars: Personalize your gameplay by choosing from a variety of avatars that reflect your personality.



📜 Themed Cards to Collect: Unlock beautiful themed cards featuring prophets, kings, priests, and Christ’s disciples by answering questions in specific chapters.


💾 Custom Save Slots: Use up to three separate save files to track your progress however you like.


🎯 Strategic Gameplay: Use bonus items like Time Extenders and Star Multipliers to conquer harder challenges.


🏆 Rewards & Milestones: Earn coins and reach major achievements as you progress — your dedication and knowledge won’t go unnoticed.



📖 True Bible Immersion: Every question is carefully organized by book, offering an unprecedented educational and spiritual journey through the Bible.


🕊 Start your biblical adventure today. Bible Trivia is more than just a game — it's a doorway to spiritual discovery. Explore the beauty and wisdom of the Bible like never before.

supported_languages: English, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Spain, Russian, German, Simplified Chinese, Japanese
